_comment: From Make-it-yours prompt 2: set default effort and model so you don't set them at the start of every session. The chapter places this at ~/.claude/settings.json (your real home config); it ships here under work/.claude/ so the companion folder stays self-contained. Use the friendly alias 'sonnet' (not a pinned versioned id like claude-sonnet-4-5) so the setting doesn't rot when minor versions roll — Claude Code resolves the alias to the current Sonnet at session start.
